purpose: Route outside Health AI Assurance Kit feedback without creating clinical validation, model ranking, endpoint, source truth, regulatory, compatibility, institution, or endorsement claims.

routes.use_when: A reviewer flags wording, missing context, usability, or boundary risk in a Health AI Assurance Kit artifact.
A reviewer finds a source locator, guideline phrase, policy phrase, DOI, PMID, or URL that needs exact claim support review.
A reviewer wants to propose a synthetic medical AI failure case without patient data or raw private output.
A reviewer reports a reproducible concern about model behavior, documentation, release quality, or evaluation design.

small_tasks.reviewer_action: Read the Start Here proof pack and identify one confusing boundary sentence.
Read SourceCheckup Medical wording and identify one claim that needs source support review.
Read Turkish drift preview and identify one sentence that could overstate language coverage.
Read clinician literacy demo and identify one place that could sound like medical advice.
Propose one synthetic failure case that fits the existing boundaries.

next_safe_action: Collect feedback through the selected public issue template and move accepted feedback into a reviewed PR.
